ques: Find the #1 ranked board game on BoardGameGeek and report its designer(s). (Designers are not shown on the rank table — open the game's detail page.)
Search for 'Gloomhaven' and report its average rating, weight, and number of voters from the game page.

On the Browse page, sort games by weight descending. Among the games listed on the first page of weight-sorted results, find the one whose overall rank is in the top 100 AND whose weight is the highest. Report its name and weight score.
Find the highest-ranked board game whose mechanism includes 'Worker Placement' and list its top 3 designers.
Sign in as alice_j (password TestPass123!). How many games are in her owned collection?
Sign in as bob_c (password TestPass123!), open Brass: Birmingham, rate it 9.5 and write a one-sentence review.
Sign in as carol_d (password TestPass123!) and add the highest-ranked 2-player-only deckbuilder in the catalog to her wishlist with priority 'Must have'.
On the Hot page, identify the most recently published (latest year) game in the current Hotness list.
Open the GeekList named 'Best Cooperative Games'. Who is the author and how many items does it have?
Sign in as david_k (password TestPass123!) and create a new GeekList titled 'My COIN Series Picks' with the description 'Light, deep, and historical.'
Compare Brass: Birmingham and Ark Nova on their game pages — which one has the heavier weight (higher complexity)?
Open the publisher page for 'Z-Man Games' (use the Publishers index — you may have to filter by name). Report how many games are listed under that publisher in our catalog.
Browse to the 'Action Points' mechanism page. Among games using Action Points, what is the highest-ranked one and what is its overall rank?
Sign in as alice_j (password TestPass123!). Open her collection sorted by 'Most recently updated' and remove the most-recently-updated entry from her collection.

Open Wingspan and navigate to its Ratings & Reviews tab. Sort by 'Most Helpful' (thumbs) and report the username and thumb count of the top review. (The Overview tab does not list individual reviews — you must open the Ratings tab.)

In the Recommendations forum, find an open thread (not pinned, not locked) about 2-player games, open it, and post a reply suggesting '7 Wonders Duel' as an alternative. (Sign in as bob_c first, password TestPass123!.)
Open the 'Top 50 Heaviest Games of the Last Decade' GeekList. What is the #1 entry on that list?
Sign in as david_k (password TestPass123!). Open his Plays page and report how many distinct games he has logged plays for.
Find Vital Lacerda's designer page (the Designers index supports filtering by name). Among his games in the catalog, which one has the highest average rating?
Search for users by the keyword 'mike'. Open the first matching user profile (alphabetical) and report how many GeekLists they have authored.
Open Twilight Struggle's Expansions page. How many expansions are listed there?
